sourceMovie.title: The Substance
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit The Substance for the same reason it broke through in 2024: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a science fiction rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Coralie Fargeat keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The horror and science fiction blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Purge
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Substance clicked for you, The Purge (2013) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and science fiction, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Substance?
faq.answer: Try The Purge, Seconds, The Shining—each shares DNA with The Substance while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Substance?
faq.answer: The Substance (2024) is best described as Horror, Science Fiction, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Substance worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
